title: sagittaria humilis
intro: Sagittaria humilis, also known as small arrowhead, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family and is native to North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like inulin, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming Sagittaria humilis is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or infusion, with some traditional uses including treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
